tasks.content: Identified missing components: cli/file-processor, cli/initial-message, cli/list-models, cli/session-picker, core/session-cwd, migrations, modes/print&rpc, package-manager-cli, config, timings, resource-loader completion
Assessed existing infrastructure: agent core, tui, runtime (partial), session, settings, extensions (partial), auth, model-registry
Architecture decision: main.ts orchestrates all components; each module TDD with tests
Create src/config.ts with APP_NAME, CONFIG_DIR_NAME, ENV_AGENT_DIR, VERSION
Implement src/cli/file-processor.ts to process @file args with image support
Implement src/cli/initial-message.ts to build initial message from args/files/stdin
Implement src/cli/list-models.ts to list models with optional search
Implement src/cli/session-picker.ts for interactive session selection
Implement src/core/session-cwd.ts for cross-project CWD resolution
Write tests for each module and ensure 100% pass
